Back to Help & Support

Guide: Cost Management & Analytics

Learn how to monitor, analyze, and optimize your platform-related costs.

Analyzing Your Costs
This guide explains the features of the Advanced Cost Management dashboard.
1

Navigate to Cost Management

From the sidebar, go to Administration > Cost Management. This is your central hub for tracking all costs.

Go to Cost Management
2

Use the Date and Filter Controls

At the top of the page, you can select a date range, filter by specific activities (like AI Analysis or Data Storage), and filter by individual users to narrow down the cost data.

3

Understand the Main Breakdown

The 'Cost Breakdown by Category' card shows you which parts of the application are contributing the most to your overall costs, such as Networking, Cybersecurity, and Storage.

4

Dive into AI & ML Costs

The 'AI & ML Cost Breakdown' card provides a detailed look at your AI-related expenses. You can see the cost per analysis, token usage, and breakdowns by AI model, user, and report type.

5

Review Cost Trends

The 'Cost Trends' table shows a historical log of daily costs and the number of executions, helping you identify spikes or changes in usage patterns over time.

6

Export Your Data

Use the 'Export & Share' button to download your filtered cost data as a PDF, DOCX, or raw data file (ZIP/XLSX) for further analysis or reporting.
